data.content: Review feedback addressed: Branch `codex/foolery-c4db-worker-a` pushed to origin at commit `ee7a1b5f2bb3385ee61c113210c3d2ca27b2c71a`. Refactored OpenCode-specific approval extraction into `src/lib/opencode-approval-request.ts`, reducing `src/lib/approval-request-visibility.ts` from 524 lines to 388 lines. Current touched source line counts: `approval-request-visibility.ts` 388, `opencode-approval-request.ts` 257, `opencode-http-session.ts` 458. Behavior preserved. Verification passed: focused approval/OpenCode tests, `bun run lint`, and `bunx tsc --noEmit`.
